ddls:
CREATE TABLE "encounters" (
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encounter */,
  "encounter_code" TEXT /* Code for the encounter (e.g., LA, LB, LC) */,
  "player_number" INTEGER /* Number of players in the encounter */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the encounter (e.g., Hard, Easy, Medium) */,
  "xp_value" INTEGER /* Experience points awarded for completing the encounter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the encounter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the encounter */,
  "gm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game master who created the encounter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the encounter */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the encounter is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encounter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounters_gm_id FOREIGN KEY ("gm_id") REFERENCES game_masters ("gm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "difficulty_levels" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level (e.g., Hard, Easy, Medium) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  "xp_multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier for experience points based on the difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balanced_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balanced scenario */,
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encounter the scenario belongs to */,
  "balance_type" TEXT /* Type of balance (e.g., Balanced 1, Balanced 2) */,
  "ave_success_rate" REAL /* Average success rate for the scenario */,
  "ave_damage" REAL /* Average damage dealt in the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the scenario was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the scenario */,
  "gm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game master who created the scenario */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balanced_scenarios_encounter_id FOREIGN KEY ("encounter_id") REFERENCES encounters ("encounter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unbalanced_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unbalanced scenario */,
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encounter the scenario belongs to */,
  "balance_type" TEXT /* Type of balance (e.g., Unbalanced 1, Unbalanced 2) */,
  "ave_success_rate" REAL /* Average success rate for the scenario */,
  "ave_damage" REAL /* Average damage dealt in the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the scenario was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the scenario */,
  "gm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game master who created the scenario */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unbalanced_scenarios_encounter_id FOREIGN KEY ("encounter_id") REFERENCES encounters ("encounter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "random_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each random event */,
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encounter the event belongs to */,
  "ave_success_rate" REAL /* Average success rate for the event */,
  "ave_damage" REAL /* Average damage dealt in the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event */,
  "gm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game master who created the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_random_events_encounter_id FOREIGN KEY ("encounter_id") REFERENCES encounters ("encounter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_masters" (
  "gm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game master */,
  "gm_name" TEXT /* Name of the game master */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the game master */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the game master account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the game master account */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the game master is an administrator */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the game master account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the player account */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player */,
  "total_xp" INTEGER /* Total experience points earned by the player */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the player account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encounter_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encounter log */,
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encounter the log belongs to */,
  "gm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game master who ran the encounter */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who participated in the encounter */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the encounter (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the log entry */,
  "damage_dealt" REAL /* Damage dealt by the player in the encounter */,
  "xp_earned" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the player in the encounter */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the encounter log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounter_logs_gm_id FOREIGN KEY ("gm_id") REFERENCES game_masters ("gm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounter_logs_encounter_id FOREIGN KEY ("encounter_id") REFERENCES encounters ("encounter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounter_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
